title: senecio multicaulis
intro: Senecio multicaulis, also known as Jacob's ladder or multicaulis groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Senecio multicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
